title: 9th AFRIMA: CNN’s Larry Madowo, Swedish Ambassador, Olisa Adibua, Juma Jux, Stonebwoy, ID Cabasa, Universal Music Chiefs, others lead conversations at Africa Music Business Summit - FinancialEDGE
description: African music has gone far beyond talent and creativity. Today, it is a fast-growing global business attracting investors, partners and major industry players from across the world. This growth will take centre stage in Lagos when stakeholders gather for the Africa Music Business Summit (AMBS), a key event of the 9th All Africa Music Awards
html: African music has gone far beyond talent and creativity. Today, it is a fast-growing global business attracting investors, partners and major industry players from across the world.
